chapter.title: Correction to: People of Jewish Heritage

sect1.title: Correction to: People of Jewish Heritage

E. A. Fenkl, L. D. Purnell (eds.)
Tan Chingfen Graduate School of Nursing, University of Massachusetts, Boston, MA, USA
Department of History and Program in Jewish Studies, University of Delaware, Newark, DE, USA

sect1.title: Correction to: People of Jewish Heritage

sidebar.title: The updated version of this chapter can be found at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-70492-5_25

sect1.title: Correction to: Chapter 25 in: Eric A. Fenkl et al. (eds.), Handbook for Culturally Competent Care, https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-70492-5_25
sect1.para: Author’s name was inadvertently published as “Polly Zavadivken” in the Table of Contents and in Chapter 25. It has been corrected as “Polly Zavadivker” in this version.
